vocab.example: I prefer traveling light, so I typically only carry the bare essentials like my keys, phone, and a small wallet.
I always make sure to have some emergency cash on my person just in case my digital payment apps fail.

vocab.meaning: vật dụng bất ly thân/không thể thiếu
vocab.example: My noise-canceling headphones have become a recurring staple in my bag to help me endure long commutes.
My smartphone is the ultimate multifunctional gadget, serving as my GPS, camera, and primary communication tool.

vocab.meaning: gọn gàng, không có đồ đạc bừa bãi
vocab.example: I try to keep my pockets clutter-free by using a slim cardholder instead of a bulky traditional wallet.
A portable power bank is an indispensable tool for me, given how quickly my phone battery drains during the day.
Before leaving the house, I double-check that all my personal effects are securely stowed in my backpack.

vocab.meaning: vật dụng có tính ứng dụng cao
vocab.example: I prioritize carrying high-utility items like a compact umbrella and a reusable water bottle.

vocab.meaning: cất gọn vào một nơi an toàn
vocab.example: I usually tuck my passport away in a hidden compartment of my bag whenever I’m traveling abroad.

vocab.meaning: giá trị về mặt tình cảm
vocab.example: Apart from practical items, I often carry a small lucky charm that holds great sentimental value for me.
